commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh For because you have trusted in your works and in your treasures, you shall also be taken: and Chemosh shall go forth into captivity with his priests and his princes together. Hebrew, "works "or possessions of corn, cattle (Calmet) Chamos, the idol of the Moabites. (Challoner) He was esteemed the king of the country, as the devil is the ape of God. The prophets often deride the imbecility of these idols, chap. The chief idol of Moab shall fall, to show the vanity of trusting in idols. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
